Our Services

Professional optometrist solutions for every need

Comprehensive Eye Exams

Thorough vision assessments tailored to Richmond's unique environmental factors.

Learn More →

Dry Eye Treatment

Specialized relief for Richmond's allergy and humidity sufferers.

Learn More →

Contact Lens Fitting

Precision fittings accounting for Richmond's climate and activities.

Learn More →

Pediatric Eye Care

Vision development expertise for Richmond's children.

Learn More →

Emergency Eye Care

Prompt treatment for eye injuries and sudden vision changes.

Learn More →
Legacy Optometrist

Trusted optometry professionals serving Richmond, VA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
